description: C# program that calls X509Certificate2.Import() through an interface dispatch (ICertProvider), triggering CVE-2023-29331.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Program.Run() dispatches through ICertProvider interface to X509Provider.Load() which calls cert.Import()

findings.human_justification: X509Provider implements ICertProvider and calls cert.Import() in its Load method. Main dispatches through the interface, reaching the vulnerable function.
